notes.game_theory_score: Market dynamics are reported as descriptive tags only to avoid double-counting sharp money.
notes.selector: Replay-tested against 2025 Weeks 11-18. Injury is spread context only; spread plays require sharp confirmation; totals need stronger alignment; injury-context spread candidates require one extra selector point.
notes.source_quality: Critical source warnings mark the run unsafe. Supporting source warnings mark the run degraded unless strict_sources is enabled. block_picks_on_unsafe forces all recommendations to pass when run status is unsafe.
